parameters.jsCode:
const p = $json.payload || {};
return [{ json: { workflow: 'application_submitted', tenant_id: p.tenant_id || null, application_id: p.application_id || null, scholarship_id: p.scholarship_id || null, scholarship_title: p.scholarship_title || '', student_id: p.student_id || null, student_email: p.student_email || '', submitted_at: p.submitted_at || '', correlation_id: p.correlation_id || '' } }];

const p = $json.payload || {};
return [{ json: { workflow: 'application_approved', tenant_id: p.tenant_id || null, application_id: p.application_id || null, scholarship_id: p.scholarship_id || null, scholarship_title: p.scholarship_title || '', student_email: p.student_email || '', changed_by: p.by || '', changed_at: p.changed_at || '', correlation_id: p.correlation_id || '' } }];

const p = $json.payload || {};
return [{ json: { workflow: 'application_rejected', tenant_id: p.tenant_id || null, application_id: p.application_id || null, scholarship_id: p.scholarship_id || null, scholarship_title: p.scholarship_title || '', student_email: p.student_email || '', reason: p.reason || '', changed_by: p.by || '', changed_at: p.changed_at || '', correlation_id: p.correlation_id || '' } }];

const p = $json.payload || {};
return [{ json: { workflow: 'application_rejected_blacklist', tenant_id: p.tenant_id || null, application_id: p.application_id || null, scholarship_id: p.scholarship_id || null, scholarship_title: p.scholarship_title || '', student_id: p.student_id || null, student_email: p.student_email || '', reason: p.reason || '', rejected_at: p.rejected_at || '', correlation_id: p.correlation_id || '' } }];

const p = $json.payload || {};
return [{ json: { workflow: 'unhandled_event', event: p.event || 'unknown', correlation_id: p.correlation_id || '', tenant_id: p.tenant_id || null, application_id: p.application_id || null, payload: p } }];
